subject: cash offers for enron wind europe

emails.subject: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe
emails.subject_base: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe
emails.body: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe Mark: In the last two days, three private equity firms have told me they would be prepared to make all-cash offers for EW's European operations before December 31. These are Babcock Brown (London), Alchemy (Frankfurt) and FBR (Washington DC). Based on what I know about Enron Wind, I would bet that the price for the European operations alone would be signicantly more attractive for Enron than the price for the combined US and European operations. I don't want to waste their time if it's too late. What should I tell them?

emails.subject: RE: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe
emails.subject_base: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe
emails.body: RE: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe Dan, Thanks for the information. Please tell anyone who is interested to call me. Thanks. Take care, Mark

emails.subject: RE: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe
emails.subject_base: Cash Offers For Enron Wind Europe
emails.body: Mark: Will do. You should be hearing from Antonino ("Toto") Lo Bianco at Babcock Brown, Mike Culhane of FBR, and Ingo Zemke of Alchemy.
